/usr/bin/c++ -fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping -O0 -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -fprofile-instr-generate CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/OncoFlowMonitor_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/src/services/StudyService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/src/widgets/StudyListWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/src/widgets/ConfigPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/src/services/ValidationService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/src/widgets/StatusPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/src/widgets/LogPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/src/services/PipelineController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/src/services/PipelineWorker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/src/services/HistoryService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/src/widgets/HistoryPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/src/widgets/RunSummaryDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/src/widgets/FrameViewer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OncoFlowMonitor.dir/src/services/FrameSource.cpp.o -o OncoFlowMonitor -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtMultimedia.framework/Versions/A/QtMultimedia /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
